texto: Like the Biblical Israelites, Americans who are afraid want to put their trust in actors who can effectively protect them, but rather than turning solely to the Lord, modern citizens might choose to put their trust in government experts.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Bethany Albertson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Like the Biblical Israelites, Americans who are afraid want to put their trust in actors who can …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, experts, trust pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trust.

frase_original: Like the Biblical Israelites, Americans who are afraid want to put their trust in actors who can effectively protect them, but rather than turning solely to the Lord, modern citizens might choose to put their trust in government experts.

texto: Democratic citizenship in an anxious world can be deeper, more informed citizenship. Without full spectrum of voices from partisan political elites, though, anxious citizens in search of protection from threats to their health and way of life may support charlatans or madman who offer bodily protection while destroying the body politic.
explicacao: Citação de Bethany Albertson sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Democratic citizenship in an anxious world can be deeper, more informed citizenship. Without full…” articula saude-mental, anxiety, democracy em registro de saude mental, com relevância para contextos como democracy e populism.
